title: Sophie Conran - Porcelain Mug - White - 10.5 x 14 x 11 cm - One Single Unit Supplied
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
description: Product Description Sophie Conran and Portmeirion have together created a beautiful collection of tableware, cookware and home accessories – designed for modern day living. This award winning collection marries together sophie’s love of food, design and family. Versatile and practical, it’s perfect for everything from elegant dinner parties to relaxed breakfasts. Sophie is a celebrated food writer, daughter of Sir Terence Conran and Caroline Conran. When she’s not looking after her two children, you’ll probably find her in the kitchen, testing out new recipes or cooking delicious feasts for her family. The Sophie Conran for Portmeirion collection is a beautiful, tactile oven-to-tableware and home accessories collection that is a joy to use every day. The rippled bodies and curved edges have the echo of the potter’s hand. Sophie’s love and respect for contemporary design and traditional craftsmanship harmonises perfectly with Portmeirion. The collection is designed to be multi-functional – the oven-to-tableware pieces look as beautiful on the table as they are practical in the kitchen. Measuring jugs morph into serving pieces whilst the roasting dishes can take centre stage on the table. Each piece of porcelain is able to withstand the rigours of contemporary living, moving with ease from the dishwasher to the microwave, the freezer to the oven. Every piece in the collection makes a sophisticated gift, with eye-catching packaging and beautiful wrapping. Box Contains Mug
